zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnell於大約1135年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾胡頓 帕格爾時，他的父親Alfred de Luttrell31歲，母親Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell27歲。他與Margaret Pine在英國英格蘭越可爾胡頓 帕格爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnell was born about 1135, in Hooton Pagnell, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Alfred de Luttrell, was 31 and his mother, Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell, was 27. He married Margaret Pine in Hooton Pagnell, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnell est né environ 1135, à Hooton Pagnell, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alfred de Luttrell, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Pine à Hooton Pagnell, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille.

ko.Hooton Pagnell, South Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 소우스 요르크실르 후턴 파그넬
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnell(이)가 대략 1135년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 후턴 파그넬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alfred de Luttrell(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell(은)는 27세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 후턴 파그넬에서 Margaret Pine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.Hooton Pagnell, South Yorkshire, England: хутон пагнелл, соут еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Luttrell II, Lord of Hooton Pagnell родился около 1135 г. в местности хутон пагнелл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alfred de Luttrell было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Alfred de Luttrell, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Pine в местности хутон пагнелл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.
